string.text: Secret Developments: deliver the schematic to the Research Institute

The secret development of item "No.62" has long been known, and advanced prototypes have been used by our military. Still, the Research Institute would benefit from having this schematic. I found it near a crashed helicopter in the vicinity of the settlement.
Dreamcatcher: await news from the Assistant
The Assistant promised to share information once he learns anything about the Dreamcatcher artifact fragment, which I discovered in the old complex.
Dreamcatcher: meet the Assistant
The Assistant has some news regarding the artifact and the sectarians. I need to meet him to find out the details.
Dreamcatcher: meet the Assistant at night near Chernobyl
The Assistant requested help in locating the second fragment of the Dreamcatcher. He will wait at night near the industrial plant in Chernobyl.
Secret of the Basement: investigate the village cellar
I found a key that likely opens the basement in the village. I need to investigate it carefully.
Collider: examine the Prophet's body
The Prophet may have a key card for the control room. I need to inspect him and gain access to the system.
Collider: disable the security system
I must quickly shut down the security system, or the installation here could trigger a catastrophic event.
Hunting Sectarians: meet with Artem
The ambush has been neutralized. Now I need to assist Artem.
Hunting Sectarians: scout the mercenary base
Fabricate's PDA reveals a link between the mercenaries and the sectarians. Their base might hold further clues.
Hunting Sectarians: investigate the complex basement
The basement of the military complex, home to Jackal's mercenaries, could contain valuable information.
Hunting Sectarians: explore the underground complex
Unexpectedly, I encountered the Assistant here, and even more surprisingly—the Dreamcatcher artifact itself. I need to investigate the complex's basement thoroughly.
Hunting Sectarians: acquire a key card
There appears to be a secured underground section beneath the military base. I need a key card to enter.
Hunting Sectarians: descend into the underground complex
With the access card, I can now enter the Collider underground complex.
Hunting Sectarians: investigate the complex
The mercenaries and sectarians are clearly plotting something. I must thoroughly examine the complex.
Hunting Sectarians: shut down the collider
The Prophet has activated the collider, and it seems highly dangerous. I must stop it immediately!
Hunting Sectarians: eliminate the Prophet
I need to finish off the sectarian leader before he causes more harm.
Trap: track down and eliminate the sniper
Thankfully, Artem survived the attack. But I must deal with the sniper who targeted him.
Trap: inspect the sniper's body
The mercenaries clearly set up an ambush here. I need to examine the sniper; he might hold valuable information.
Spatial Bubble: consult Bes about the anomaly
Bes, being a seasoned "Digger", might know something about these anomalies. I should talk to him.
Cordon: protect Artem from mercenaries
I must eliminate the mercenaries attacking Artem and myself before it's too late.
Leads: investigate the village
Leads: examine the suspicious door

According to Artem "Kolobok", a deal between the sectarians and mercenaries is set to happen here. The Prophet might even attend. Near the village church, suspicious individuals have been spotted. I need to investigate carefully to uncover useful clues about the sectarians.
Drone Mystery: examine the radio beacons
The drone's memory module contained four radio beacons. I need to investigate them to understand what's happening.
Drone Mystery: study the spatial bubble
After activating all the locators, an anomalous surge occurred at the village tower. I must investigate the newly appeared spatial bubble.
Drone Mystery: uncover the drone's secret
An unmanned drone is trapped inside the spatial bubble. I suspect it is the same drone that was seen in the river.
Drone Mystery: request a decoder from the scientists
To close the spatial bubble, I need a decoder. Such a device can only be obtained from the scientists.
Drone Mystery: retrieve the decoder from Phobos
Professor Ozersky allowed me to take a decoder from Phobos at the warehouse. This will help in closing the anomaly.
Drone Mystery: deactivate the spatial anomaly
I must use the decoder provided by the scientists to close the spatial bubble before it grows uncontrollably.
Drone Mystery: report to Bes
With the spatial bubble successfully closed, I should inform Bes so he can rest easy.
Hunting Sectarians: track down and neutralize the Prophet
To end the threat of the sectarians in the Zone, I must find and stop their leader—the Prophet. Stopping him will collapse their plans and greatly reduce the danger they pose.
Hunting Sectarians: coordinate with Kolobok

Nikita is safe, and I decided to stay in the Zone. My priority now is to track down the Prophet and stop him at any cost. Kolobok (Artem) contacted me—he also wants to find the Prophet and has information that could help. I should meet with him to combine our efforts.
Anomalous Device: investigate the drone disappearance
An unmanned aerial vehicle that crashed in the river of Zalesye mysteriously vanished before my eyes. I need to examine the spot where it supposedly fell—something anomalous is at play.
Anomalous Device: show the memory module to Lyokha
At the river where the drone disappeared, I recovered a wet, yet intact (locked) memory module. I should show it to Lyokha, the Digger and technician—he might be able to unlock it.
Anomalous Device: wait for memory module to be unlocked
I need to wait while Lyokha works on unlocking the memory module.
Anomalous Device: talk to Lyokha
Lyokha informed me that he has successfully unlocked the memory module I found. I should review its contents.
Strange Woman: ask Tsitra why she stayed behind
Tsitra seems to have left the sectarian group, but why didn't she leave with Quantum? I need to ask her.
Soldier to Soldier: check on Kolobok
Kolobok escaped captivity with my brother and friend. I should speak with him and see how he’s doing.
Old Comrade: check on Sheriff
Sheriff survived and seems sane. I need to talk to him and ensure everything is alright.
Final Effort: talk to Nikita
Nikita is safe. The Sheriff is alive. Everything seems in order… now only the final steps remain.
Final Effort: call the helicopter
It’s time to bring Nikita home. The Zone won’t be easy on him, so he must leave safely.
Final Push: wait for the evacuation helicopter
Final Push: speak with the pilot
Running Errands: deliver the compromising data to Quantum
It’s finally over… the information has been handed over.
Contract for a Good Life: escape or fight the mercenaries
Mercenaries started hunting me in the canyon. Who ordered this? I doubt it was Hack. I need to find out the truth personally.
Contract for a Good Life: speak with Hack
Contract for a Good Life: confront Mercenary Jackal
Jackal’s group of mercenaries follows sectarian orders, and one of those orders was aimed at me. I must deal with him.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: meet Gloria
Professor Bernad asked me to help his colleague Gloria scan the anomalous psy-effects in the aquapark. Reports mention a strange psy-field… possibly ghosts.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: meet Gloria at the aquapark
Ghosts of the Aquapark: wait while Gloria adjusts the scanner
I need to wait until Gloria finishes calibrating the scanner.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: talk to Gloria
The scanner detected strange, eerie sounds. I need to consult Gloria about these anomalies.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: inspect the second floor
The device picked up odd conversations coming from the aquapark. The pool seems to be the source.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: eliminate the poltergeist
A poltergeist is causing disturbances in the pool. I must eliminate it.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: destroy anomalous spheres
Several aggressive anomalous spheres are in the pool. I need to destroy them to stop further incidents.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: return to Gloria
After destroying the poltergeists, I blacked out. I need to return to Gloria and assess the situation.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: locate Gloria
Ghosts of the Aquapark: follow the woman's scream
I heard a woman scream—likely Gloria! I must hurry to help her.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: help Gloria stand up
Gloria seems exhausted. I found her and need to help her regain her strength.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: locate Gloria's scanner
The poltergeists likely took Gloria’s device. I need to search the aquapark to retrieve it.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: return the device to Gloria
I recovered the device from the pool; now I need to give it back to Gloria.
Ghosts of the Aquapark: report to Professor Bernad
The scanning task is complete. Time to report to Professor Bernad and claim the reward.
Cave Research: Report Your Readiness to Riddick

Docent Riddick requested my assistance with exploring the underground caves beneath the complex. He warned that only someone equipped with a sealed suit or exoskeleton can survive there—the air is heavily contaminated and the chemical anomalies could kill in seconds.
Cave Research: Follow the Scientist
I need to accompany and protect Riddick while he conducts his research in the caves.
Cave Research: Protect the Scientist
Cave Research: Talk to Riddick
Riddick has finished his work in the caves. I need to meet him and report my findings.
Cave Research
Assist Riddick in exploring the caves under the complex
Secret Catacombs: Locate the Underground Entrance
Secret Catacombs: Reach Zalesye Through the Catacombs
Secret Catacombs: Descend Into the Underground

Quantum said the safest place, where the Prophet is unlikely to search, is near the village of Zalesye. But recent anomalies have blocked all surface routes. The only way is through the unexplored underground catacombs.
Errand: Retrieve the Buried Compromising Material
Artyom (Kolobok) buried the compromising material on the sectarians in the graveyard of the unexplored territories. I need to recover it quickly to protect my friends.
Errand: Negotiate the Deal
The material is now in my possession, but I must meet the sectarians to discuss the deal. I won’t let them deceive me.
Errand: Arrive at the Meeting Point
Kvant is waiting at the designated location with the compromising material. I need to reach him safely.
Rescue Center: Talk to Citra
Kvant said that to save my brother Nikita and my friend Sheriff, I need to comply with his temporary truce. First, I need to talk to Citra at the sectarians' base in the metro.
Rescue Center: Talk to Kolobok
I need to retrieve the compromising material Kolobok hid. My first step is to talk to him.
Cursed Church: Give Consent to Help
I need to tell Bes that I am ready to assist in dealing with the psy-radiation in the church.
Cursed Church: Cover Bes
I need to protect Bes while he sets up the device.
Cursed Church: Eliminate the Poltergeists
The psy-radiation seems to have subsided, but poltergeists remain. I must destroy them!
Cursed Church: Find the Source of the Psy-effect
Bes has been affected by psy-radiation. I need to locate its source and neutralize it quickly!
Strange Affairs: Talk to Bes
Bes asked me not to enter the church alone and to help him investigate the paranormal activity. I need to talk to him and understand the situation.
Strange Affairs: Find the Missing Scientists

Bes mentioned that poltergeists have occupied the church, preventing anyone from entering safely. I need to locate the scientists' device to detect psy-activity, which may help us track the restless spirits.
Strange Affairs: Retrieve the Device
I found the scientists' device. I need to retrieve it for further investigation.
Strange Affairs: Show the Device to Bes
I need to show the scientists' device to Bes so he can use it to detect anomalous psy-activity.
Reason of Conscience: Wait for Night
I made my choice. I need to wait for night to hand over the secret documents to the Prophet's associate.
Reason of Conscience: Meet with the Sectarian
At night, I must deliver the secret document to the Prophet's contact.
Reason of Conscience: Return to the Prophet
I did everything as instructed by the Prophet... I hope he will release my brother Nikita and my friend Sheriff.
Reason of Conscience: Help Nikita Stand Up
The Prophet lied to me. He killed Sheriff... and Nikita is badly wounded. I must help him stand.
Reason of Conscience: Talk to Colonel Koval'sky
I made my choice. I need to coordinate with the military to storm the sectarians' base.
Reason of Conscience: Give the Signal of Readiness

My brother and friend might already be dead... but I have nothing to lose. Together with Colonel Koval'sky and the military detachment, I will attack the sectarians' base and eliminate the Prophet first.
No Mercy: Descend into the Metro
It’s time to end the sectarians. There will be no mercy; I will eliminate everyone in my path.
No Mercy: Chase the Prophet
The Prophet is fleeing through the metro tunnels. He won’t get far—I’m coming for him. He will pay for everything.
No Mercy: Finish off the Prophet
Difficult Choice: Go to the Research Institute
Difficult Choice: Follow the Prophet’s Orders or Betray the Institute
My brother Nikita and my friend Sheriff are prisoners of the Prophet. If I defy him, they will die. But if I betray the institute, I become a traitor. I must make a choice.
Revolution: Meet with Kvant or Turn Him In
Revolution: Talk to Kvant
Kvant, a sectarian, wants to overthrow the Prophet. Can I trust him? Maybe this is my only chance to save Nikita and Sheriff—or perhaps I should betray him to the Prophet. I need to decide carefully.
Solving Problems: Request Military Assistance
This is risky. Asking the military for help might provoke the Prophet to kill Nikita and Sheriff. But it could also be the only way. I need to choose carefully.
Chains and Shackles: Inspect the Underground Complex
The generator is running, and the path to the “sacred place” is open. I need to inspect the area and report back to the Prophet.
Chains and Shackles: Contact the Prophet
I need to get in touch with the Prophet.
Anomalous Mushrooms
Unravel the mystery of the glowing mushrooms.
Mushroom Field: Meet Danya before Dawn
I need to meet Danya before dawn to observe the glowing anomalous mushrooms together.
Mushroom Field: Follow Danya
Danya led me to a field of anomalous mushrooms. I should cover him, just in case...
Mushroom Field: Cover Danya
Mushroom Field: Bring Danya to Consciousness
Danya seems to have succumbed to the mushrooms' fumes and passed out. I need to wake him up.
Mushroom Field: Talk to Danya
Mushroom Field: Escape from the Room
After passing out near the mushroom field, Danya and I are trapped in a room. Trying to leave only returns us back. This must be a teleport anomaly—but who activated it and why?
Mushroom Field: Escape from the Anomaly
Mushroom Field: Exit the Building
The teleport anomaly seems to have deactivated. I need to escape from this house with Danya.
Mushroom Field: Escape from the Mysterious House
Something—or someone—is preventing us from leaving this building. We must find a way out.
Expedition
Help Athena with her problem.
Expedition: Gather a Team for Athena
Athena asked me to gather a two-person team for an expedition to the underground laboratory beneath the industrial plant. I should ask around—maybe someone will join.
Expedition: Find the Second Team Member
I have already found one member for Athena’s expedition. Now I need to find the second person.
Expedition: Talk to Athena
I have gathered two people for the expedition. I need to discuss the next steps with Athena.
Expedition: Inform Athena of Readiness
I need to tell Athena that I am ready to start the expedition.
Laboratory: Follow Athena
Laboratory: Cover Athena
Laboratory: Talk to Athena
We descended into the underground laboratory beneath the industrial plant. Athena will explore it, and I need to assist her.
Wonder Fish: Inspect the Area
I need to inspect the marshy area—the mutant could be nearby.
Wonder Fish: Inform the Stalker
The mutant was nearby all along and appears to have died from blood loss. I should report this to the stalker.
Black Data: Insert the Flash Drive
The flash drive I found in the safe near the stalkers' camp might contain some secrets. I need to insert it into the laptop.
Chains and Shackles: Reach the Coordinates
The Prophet needs me to clear the entrance to the "sacred place."
Chains and Shackles: Restore Power to the Hermetic Door
I need to restore the power supply to the door leading to the "sacred place."
Chains and Shackles: Fix the Power Generator
I need to fix the power generator. For this, I should find a technician capable of handling it.
Chains and Shackles: Assist the Technician
I need to help Technar with repairing the generator.
Chains and Shackles: Start the Power Generator
Chains and Shackles: Check the Hermetic Door Operation
The power generator is running. I must ensure the hermetic door is functioning and then report to the Prophet.
Underground Inhabitants: Eliminate the Mutant
It seems a mutant is responsible for the hermetic door being closed.
Golden Hands: Contact the Technician
I need to repair the generator. I must contact the technician, "Technar," although the underground connection is poor.
Golden Hands: Wait for the Technician
I need to wait for Technar to arrive.
Underground Again: Descend into the Flooded Area
The generator powering the hermetic door is located in the flooded underground.
Underground Again: Find the Power Generator
I need to locate the generator in the flooded underground and restart it to power the hermetic door.
Underground Again: Inspect the Power Generator
I need to inspect the power generator—it may be malfunctioning due to water damage.
Control Panel Access: Find Key-Card "V-3"
Control Panel Access: Take Key-Card "V-3"
To activate the water drain control panel, the V3 key-card is required.
Emergency Situation: Find the Control Panel
Emergency Situation: Activate the Control Panel
Emergency Situation: Turn the Valve to Drain Water
To access the lower floors, I need to locate the emergency water control panel. Turning it off should lower the water level.
Crusade: Go to the Surface
The Prophet claims he will spare the lives of my brother Nikita and friend Sheriff. In return, I must carry out his orders.
The Price of Friendship: Help the Sheriff
The Sheriff may be brainwashed or in shock from Molag's death. I must help him.
The Price of Friendship: Fulfill the Prophet's Conditions
One Blood: Save the Younger Brother
My brother Nikita is held hostage by the sect members. I must rescue him.
One Blood: Talk to the Prophet
One Blood: Fulfill the Prophet's Conditions
Captives: Find a Way Out
The sect members are holding us in a cage. I need to escape—but what comes next?
Captives: Ask About My Brother
My brother is a captive. Their leader, the "Prophet," will reveal what I need to know.
Unloading: Retrieve Personal Belongings
The sect members took all my equipment, weapons, ammo, and armor. I need to reclaim them.
Remembrance: Find Nikita's Wife
Remembrance: Answer the Call
Remembrance: Leave the Building

I learned that my brother Nikita planned an expedition to the Zone. I must interrupt my vacation and return. Phones are off, doors locked... Maybe his wife Michelle at the Research Institute knows something.
Metro Line: Reach the Sect Base
Metro Line: Apply Voltage
Metro Line: Break Through to the Sect Base
Metro Line: Eliminate the Sect Member
We descended into the metro beneath the sanatorium. I must locate the sect base, as my brother is likely held there.
Ticket to the Morgue: Go to the Secret Station
I have the key card for the underground station beneath the sanatorium. Molag mentioned the sect base is there and Nikita is captive. I must rescue him.
Honestly Lying: Verify Garrota's Words
If Garrota is truthful, the fake Freedom member has escaped. We need to confirm this.
Honestly Lying: Talk to Garrota
The fake Freedom member escaped. I should discuss the situation with Garrota; maybe he can be trusted.
Bad Manners: Go to the Test Complex
Bad Manners: Find the Trader
Bad Manners: Detain the Trader

Garrota betrayed me and issued a kill order in my name. He lurks in the underground test complex. I need to find him, neutralize him, and retrieve the key card to the sanatorium station, if he has it.
Sanatorium Secrets: Give the Envelope to the Trader
Sanatorium Secrets: Examine the Trader's Table
Sanatorium Secrets: Wait for Night
Sanatorium Secrets: Hide the Envelope in the Indicated Place
Sanatorium Secrets: Deal with the Unknown
Sanatorium Secrets: Examine the Unknown Corpse
Deadly Trick: Destroy the Mutant
Deadly Trick: Help Tesak
Deadly Trick: Check the Main Hall
Deadly Trick: Call the Elevator
Deadly Trick: Go Upstairs
Deadly Trick: Fend Off the Sect Members
Someone attacked the bar. We need to act quickly!
Secrets of the Dead: Insert the Flash Drive into the Laptop
I found a flash drive in a rotten corpse at the "Lucky" bar. I need to check its contents on the camp laptop.
Deal with the Devil: Wait for the Mercenaries' Response
Deal with the Devil: Meet with Tesak
I'm at the "Lucky" bar. Their fortified base is here. I must find their leader, Tesak, deliver the case, and return to Garrota for the key card.
Betrayal: Find Evidence on Marcus
Recker is badly wounded. I need proof that his partner Marcus betrayed him, causing his death.
Betrayal: Find and Deal with Marcus
A severely injured mercenary asked me to find the traitor responsible: Marcus. He usually hangs around the mercenary bar.
Betrayal: Tell Tesak about Marcus
Marcus betrayed Recker, resulting in his death. I need to inform Tesak, the leader of the mercenaries in the bar.
Fragments of Personality: Gather More Information About the "Prophet"
The "Prophet" is the main culprit in my brother's kidnapping and leader of the local sect. I must gather more information about him.
Digital Media: Insert the Flash Drive into the Laptop
I found a flash drive from a sect member in the sanatorium. I need to check its contents on the camp laptop.
Sheriff's Opinion: Consult with the Sheriff
It's worth asking the Sheriff about the deal with Garrota. He might give valuable advice.
Molag's Opinion: Consult with Molag
It's worth asking Molag about the deal with Garrota. He might provide good guidance.
Time is Money: Talk to Garrota
Time is Money: Sit at the Negotiation Table
Time is Money: Discuss the Trader's Requirements
Time is Money: Take the Case from Garrota
Time is Money: Reach the Mercenary Base
Sanatorium Secrets: Obtain the Key Card
New Details: Discuss the Situation with Molag
Reconnaissance: Inform the Sheriff of Readiness
Reconnaissance: Talk to Molag
Reconnaissance: Set Up an Ambush for the Sect Members
Reconnaissance: Eliminate the Sect Members
Reconnaissance: Examine the Sect Member
"Chemical Clot": Learn About the Artifact's Properties
"Chemical Clot": Wait for Information from the Professor
"Chemical Clot": Talk to the Professor
In the container I found at the school, there was a strange artifact. I need to learn more about this "Chemical Clot."
Old Friends: Talk to Ilae
In the camp, I met an old acquaintance. I don't remember him well, but he asked me to come see him when I have time to discuss something.
Sect Members: Learn About the Medallion
In the old school, I found a medallion on a sect member's corpse. I want to know more about it. Maybe someone can provide information?
Scholars' Contract: Obtain the "Compass" Artifact
Scholars' Contract: Bring the Artifact to Rezak
The stalker Rezak wants to become a courier for Doc but must first fulfill the contract with the scholars to find the "Compass" artifact. According to Rezak, it can be found near electro-anomalies.
Medications
Help Doc with the Supply of Medical Preparations.
Medications: Talk to the Scholars
Medications: Talk to Rezak
Medications: Help Rezak Fulfill the Scholars' Contract
Medications: Inform Doc About the New Courier
Doc asked me to find a courier so he can receive medical supplies, allowing him to trade in medications.
Valuable Information: Insert the Flash Drive into the Laptop
At the old school, I found a flash drive, possibly left intentionally. I need to check its contents on the camp laptop.
Closed Case: Talk to Tehnyar
Closed Case: Take the Tools
Closed Case: Hand Over the Tools
Closed Case: Wait for the Case to be Opened
Closed Case: Talk to Tehnyar
At the old school, I found a closed case. It may clarify details about what happened to Nikita.
Hackers: Wait for the PDA to be Hacked
Hackers: Ask the Sheriff About the PDA
At the old school, one clue was a blocked PDA. The Sheriff promised to handle its hacking.
Day by Day: Talk to the Sheriff
Nikita's trail ends in the old school, but we found some clues. Now I need to discuss our leads with the Sheriff.
Calm and Serene: Reach the Attack Site
Calm and Serene: Examine the Entire School
Calm and Serene: Find More Clues About What Happened
Calm and Serene: Discuss the Findings with the Sheriff
The trail to the disappearance of the expedition, in which my brother Nikita participated, leads to the old school. I need to examine it; maybe there are clues left behind.
Reconnaissance: Go to the Meeting Place
One Blood: Find the Younger Brother

My brother Nikita has disappeared. Before that, he signed a contract with the scholars and joined a scientific expedition as a companion and guard for the ecologists. Contact with him and his group was lost. I must find him at any cost.
Nightmare: Talk to the Unknown
No additional information about the task
